name: cloudbuster-nine
description: Anne Keene's Cloudbuster Nine — baseball and WWII history toolkit telling the untold story of Ted Williams and the Navy pre-flight baseball team at UNC Chapel Hill, revealing how sports, military training, and morale intersected during World War II
useCase: Discover the forgotten story of Ted Williams' WWII service, understand the Navy pre-flight training program, and explore the intersection of sports and military history
knownRisks: The book is a narrative history, not an academic study — some details may be anecdotal
Baseball-focused readers may want more game details; military history readers may want more training details
The story relies heavily on a single family's memorabilia and memories
